assertions.reason: The /admin dashboard rendered aggregate source health cards, ingestion health, coverage gaps, and a populated source table with per-source last-check and article count data.
evidence: Screenshot admin-page.png shows Aggregate Stats, Ingestion Health, Coverage Gaps, and Source Health sections together on the page.
Visible text included "303 Total Sources", "117 Healthy", "55 Failed", "130 Empty", a pipeline status card, and source rows such as "24.kg English OK ... 53 Kyrgyzstan".

assertions.reason: The admin route exposed the current source catalog and ingestion health with healthy/failed status badges, last-check timing, article counts, and coverage-gap information.
evidence: The dashboard showed an Updated timestamp plus ingestion metadata such as Last Attempt, Last Success, Consecutive Failures, and refresh state.
Status filter chips surfaced OK/Empty/Failed counts, and the table rendered per-source status, mode, last-checked time, article count, and country.

interactiveChecks.action: Opened http://localhost:5173/admin in an isolated browser session.
interactiveChecks.observed: The Admin Dashboard loaded with source health cards, ingestion health, coverage gaps, and a searchable source table.
